CustomField.label: No Show Count
CustomField.description: Running count of no-shows for this patient; captured now, enforcement deferred to phase 2 (REQ-017/OQ-007). Incremented by VS_NoShowBatch (VS-12). Added 2026-07-12 as a batched review fix (A-013, MAJOR gap) closing the omission from VS-07's original C1-minimal build: design §2.3 lists this field on VS_Patient__c, and VS-12 (Sprint 2) increments VS_Patient__c.VS_No_Show_Count__c — without it VS-12 would fail to deploy. NOT person/C1 data (it's a derived count of booking-behavior events, not a C1.1 person attribute), so it does not affect this object's data-minimization posture (rules/10 C1). No automation in this ticket sets or reads this field; VS-12 owns the increment.
